response.justification: Bogdan has 11+ years of full-stack experience with a strong match to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Vitest) and additional expertise in Kotlin/Java, MongoDB, and cloud platforms. His roles demonstrate end-to-end ownership of scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and user-centric features, with measurable impact in high-throughput environments.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with direct alignment to TypeScript/Node.js/React stack
Proven track record building scalable systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/second, AI-agent infrastructure)
Strong problem-solving and architecture skills with customer-oriented delivery focus
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js (though Node.js expertise likely covers similar patterns)
No direct reference to Vitest in resume (though testing frameworks like Jest are mentioned)
Primary focus on backend/data-intensive roles may skew slightly toward backend over frontend in recent years
